title: Data & Analytics Engineering skill gap summary
text: The most frequent missing skills for Data & Analytics Engineering graduates are SQL, Python for data pipelines, ETL and orchestration, cloud fundamentals, and dashboarding. Statistics is commonly present but data engineering tooling is the main gap.

title: Data engineering demand in Santiago
text: Demand for data engineering roles in Santiago is strong, with frequent requirements for SQL, Python, and cloud platforms. Median salary bands are higher than for general analyst roles.

title: Civil Engineering to data roles transition
text: Civil Engineering graduates from Universidad de Chile often transition into data and analytics roles, leveraging strong mathematics and statistics foundations while needing to add programming and pipeline skills.
